display.purpose: The single headline metric per card (week %, streak count).

title.purpose: Card headers, task titles, list-row primary text.

label.purpose: Short uppercase stat captions only (≤4 words).

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Barely-there lift for resting cards; often omitted in favor of the border.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for transitions and loading bar.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Tactile active state on every button, paired with haptics on mobile.

components.name: Primary Button (Ink)
components.description: Default UI action. Ink fill, not green — green is reserved for affirmative actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 48px; padding: 0 20px; border: none; border-radius: 16px; background: #0A0A0A; color: #fff; font-family: Nunito, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s, transform .1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #171717; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(10,10,10,0.25); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: CTA Button (Momentum Green)
components.description: The affirmative action: Create, Complete, Log. One per screen. Pill shape.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-cta"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12l5 5L20 7"/></svg>Complete task</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 18px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #00A63E; color: #fff; font-family: Nunito, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s, transform .1s; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: #008236; } .ds-btn-cta:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,166,62,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Pill / Chip
components.description: Filter/toggle pill. Muted by default; active state inverts to ink fill, not a color shift.
components.css: .ds-pill { padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(10,10,10,0.12); border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #737373; font-family: Nunito, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: color .15s, background .15s; } .ds-pill:hover { color: #404040; } .ds-pill--active { background: #171717; color: #fff; border-color: #171717; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Resting surface. Border-defined and near-flat; no resting shadow.
components.html:
This Week
0%
Tasks done
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 16px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 16px; background: #171717; font-family: Nunito, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card__head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #737373; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 14px; } .ds-card__head span { color: #e5e5e5; } .ds-card__metric { font-size: 40px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #fff; } .ds-card__metric span { font-size: 18px; } .ds-card__label { margin-top: 6px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #737373; }

components.name: Input / Field
components.description: Text field with accent-border focus, no heavy glow. ≥16px font to prevent iOS zoom.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 14px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 24px; background: #171717; color: #fff; font-family: Nunito, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; outline: none; transition: border-color .15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #525252; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(0,201,80,0.7); }

components.name: Progress Readout (Week Bars)
components.description: Signature instrument. Status ramp: green ≥70%, amber 40–69%, rose <40%. A glance reads on-track / at-risk / behind.
components.html:
M
T
W
T
F
components.css: .ds-bars { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 10px; height: 90px; font-family: Nunito, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px; flex: 1; height: 100%; justify-content: flex-end; } .ds-bar span { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #737373; } .ds-bar i { width: 100%; max-width: 14px; height: var(--h); min-height: 4px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--c); transition: height .3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); }

narrative.overview: PlanR is a dark-first command surface for people running their own execution OS. Every screen is an instrument panel: the day's tasks, the week's bars, the streak, the trend — all live readouts, with the next action never more than one tap away. The system is calm under its energy. Motivation is real and earned, not manufactured with confetti. Color is a signal, not decoration. The interface is native-fast: it renders instantly from local data, responds to every press, and never makes you wait.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-mode-first; both themes are first-class, never an afterthought.
One confident accent (Momentum Green) on a disciplined neutral base.
Near-flat, border-defined surfaces — depth from hairlines and tonal layering, not shadow.
Single typeface (Nunito) carrying the whole hierarchy through weight and scale.
Motion is feedback, not choreography: fast, purposeful, reduced-motion-safe.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Momentum Green means progress: done, success, streak, the next-step CTA. It never appears as decoration. If green isn't reporting forward motion, it shouldn't be on screen.

rules.name: The Ink-First Rule
rules.body: The default action button is ink (#0A0A0A), not green. Green is spent on the affirmative action (Create, Complete, Log). Two green buttons competing on one screen is a bug.

rules.name: The One Big Number Rule
rules.body: Display size is for a single headline metric per card. If two numbers fight for Display weight, neither is the headline; demote one to Title.

rules.name: The Border-Before-Shadow Rule
rules.body: A resting surface is defined by its border and tone, not a shadow. Reach for shadow only when an element genuinely floats above the page (nav, sheet, popover). Stacked shadows on flat cards are forbidden.

dos: Do keep Momentum Green (#00A63E) for progress only — CTAs, completion, streaks, the next action. Let its rarity make it mean something.
Do make the default action button ink (#0A0A0A), spending green only on the affirmative action on a screen.
Do define resting surfaces with 1px hairline borders and tonal layering; reach for shadow only when an element truly floats.
Do carry the whole type hierarchy with Nunito weight + scale; one Display number per card.
Do give every button active:scale-[0.98] and pair it with haptics on mobile; keep tap targets ≥44px.
Do ship every state in both light and dark, and give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
donts: Don't build the gamified/childish habit-app look: no mascots, confetti spam, or badge-spam.
Don't drift toward a cluttered enterprise PM tool: no Jira-dense gray panel overload.
Don't use the generic AI-SaaS template: no purple gradients, gradient text, tracked uppercase eyebrows on every section, or hero-metric clichés.
Don't ship a sterile corporate calendar grid with zero warmth.
Don't use a border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or rows.
Don't nest a bordered card inside another bordered card; use a tonal inner panel.
Don't stack drop shadows on flat resting cards, or use ALL-CAPS sentences.
